name: D3 Ch12 — Vault of the Drow Wandering Monsters, Fungi and Crystal Forest (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for Fungi and Crystal Forest terrain in the Vault of the Drow, Chapter 12 of D3. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12 per turn. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d12 on this table. Use when moving within glowing fungal forests and crystal formation clusters.

results.text: Shriekers (4–8) with violet fungi (2–5 interspersed; shriekers: HD 3, hp 18, AC 7; violet fungi: HD 3, hp 18, 4 rotting tentacles)
Violet fungi (3–6; HD 3, hp 18, AC 7, 4 tentacles — touch causes rotting disease; XPV 100 each)
Myconid patrol (2–8 myconid workers; HD 3, hp 18, AC 10, peaceful unless attacked, spore communication; XPV 35 each)
Drow patrol, mixed (2 male fighters HD 3+3, 1 patrol leader HD 5+5 + non-drow troops; roll 1d4: 1=bugbears 4–8, 2=quaggoths 3–6, 3=giant spiders 2–4, 4=hook horrors 1–3)
Quaggoths (3–6; HD 3+3, hp 22, AC 5, #AT 2, Dmg 2–8/2–8; XPV 100 each)
Giant spiders (2–5; HD 4+4, hp 32, AC 4, SA poison; XPV 245 each)
Carrion crawlers (1–3; HD 3+1, hp 22, AC 3, 8 tentacles — paralysis on touch, save vs. paralysis; XPV 300 each)
Gas spores (1–3; resemble beholders, HD 1, hp 1, AC 10; explode on touch releasing 10' spore cloud — save vs. death or die in 24 hours; XPV 35 each)
Bugbears (4–8; HD 3+1, hp 18, AC 5, #AT 1, Dmg 2–8; XPV 135 each)
Hook horrors (1–4; HD 5, hp 40, AC 3, #AT 2, Dmg 3–8/3–8; XPV 320 each)
Troglodytes (5–10; HD 2, hp 12, AC 5, #AT 3, SA stench; XPV 28 each)

Mold hazard — roll 1d2: 1=green slime (1 patch; dissolves organic material, save vs. death or become slime in 1d4 rounds), 2=yellow mold (1 patch; disturbing releases 10' spore cloud, save vs. poison or die)
